column1: The following criteria assess whether the document

column2:
Overview or summary section is present
and appears within the first page

Heading levels are consistent (no skipping
from H1 to H3)
Navigation aids (TOC or sidebar) present for documents exceeding 2000 words

column1: These rules verify that the technical content
is sufficiently thorough for the intended audience.

column2: All function parameters include name and type

Return values documented with type
description and edge cases
Error handling section present with specific error types

Authentication requirements
fully described including
token format and expiration

At least one code example
per major feature

column1: The following rules result in automatic document rejection

column2:
Undocumented breaking changes in current release
(MANDATORY — any violation results in
automatic rejection)
Dead links or references to removed content
Version numbers that do not match the current release
